title: 如何看待乌克兰计划对拒绝征招者 建立“逃兵大名单”？
meta_description: 如何看待乌克兰计划对拒绝征招者 建立“逃兵大名单”？ - People's deputy, member of the Council's committee on national defense, security and intelligence, representative of t...
meta_keywords: 看待,乌克兰,计划,拒绝,征招,建立,逃兵大名单
contents:
People's deputy, member of the Council's committee on national defense, security and intelligence, representative of the president in the parliament Fedir Venislavskyi said that he is working on a draft law on the register of " evaders ". In an interview with " Focus ", he shared that the document has not yet been registered with the Supreme Court.

Currently, the deputy is finalizing the details of such an initiative. Its meaning is as follows: if a conscript was informed about the need to come to the military commissariat, but did not appear, （for example twice in a row） then the TCC has the right to publish his personal data, including the first name and last name, etc.

"If a person was healthy, and was informed and confirmed that he received a summons to the TCC, but did not appear, then this means that he is deliberately not fulfilling his constitutional duty to protect our Motherland," says the parliamentarian.

source：https://www.unian.ua/society/mobilizaciya-v-ukrajini-mozhe-z-yavitis-reyestr-uhilyantiv-hto-tudi-potrapit-12198729.html

discussions.content: 这也是反人类做法，跟常凯申的清算汉奸异曲同工吧。
@末世红尘客: 和清算汉奸两回事吧，逃避兵役的处理应该是有法可依的
